title: Optimizing a Simple Resume
scenario: A job seeker wants to create a resume that matches a standard template. The target output should be a formatted Markdown text (not exceeding 3 lines) that lists the job seeker's name, experience, and education. The output should be in a neat and tidy format, using bold and italic text for headings.
constraints: Must use bold and italic text for headings

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the constraints (not exceeding 3 lines and proper use of bold and italic text for headings)
Check if the Markdown syntax is valid
Check if the output contains the job seeker's name, experience, and education
Check if the output is well-formatted and easy to read
